span.p:
Components:
- ThreatModelPage
- StigmergicResultsView
- Attack Graph Visualization
- Mitigation Selection

span.p:
API Routers:
- /api/swarm/* - Threat modeling
- /api/intel/* - Threat intelligence
- /api/archive/* - Results storage
- /api/llm/* - Model management

APT29, Lazarus, Scattered Spider,
Cloud-Native, Supply Chain,
Insider, Ransomware, etc.

Pheromone-based reinforcement
AttackNode + AttackEdge

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dynamic Security Reasoning
Generic approach
Applied to any config

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5 Evaluation Agents:
- Feasibility 30%
- Impact 25%
- Detection 15%
- Novelty 15%
- Coherence 15%
